allow: PowerShell($p = Start-Process npm -ArgumentList "run","dev","--","--port","5199","--strictPort" -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput dev.log -RedirectStandardError dev.err -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest http://localhost:5199 -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "ROOT HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $j = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:5199/src/main.tsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; Write-Output "MAIN HTTP $\($j.StatusCode\), bytes=$\($j.RawContentLength\)" } catch { Write-Output "REQ ERR: $_" }; Stop-Process -Id $p.Id -Force; Write-Output "---LOG---"; Get-Content dev.log,dev.err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Remove-Item dev.log,dev.err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)
